metadata.title: Guarda Rios - Data
metadata.description: Water quality data sharing portal — Guarda Rios Project

home.title: Data Portal
home.welcome: Welcome to the Guarda Rios Project data sharing portal. We monitor the water quality of Portuguese rivers in real time, making data accessible to everyone.
home.about1: The Guarda Rios Project focuses on monitoring the water quality of Portuguese rivers.
home.about2: Through distributed monitoring stations, we collect real-time data on temperature and turbidity.
home.about3: All data and hardware are open source, licensed under <mit>MIT</mit> and <cern>CERN-OHL-P v2</cern>.

dashboard.invalidTimeRange: The start date must be before the end date.

geral.description: Overview of all sensors — update every 30s
